title: HENBRANDT 1x Mini Jungle Animal Paddle Bat and Ball Game Biff Bats for Kids Birthday Party Bag Favours Loot Bag Fillers Stocking Fillers Wedding Games for Girls and Boys
features: HENBRANDT 1x Mini Jungle Animal Paddle Bat and Ball Game Biff Bats for Kids Birthday Party Bag Favours Loot Bag Fillers Stocking Fillers Wedding Games for Girls and Boys
These mini bat and ball games for kids make great party bag fillers, goody bags, classroom rewards and Christmas gifts.
There are three paddle designs and colors available: green, blue and orange with red balls attached to a rubber band. These designs are subject to availability and will be sent at random.
description: These mini jungle animal paddle bat and ball games make a great pocket money toy for kids and are also ideal as lucky charm prizes, party bag gifts, stocking fillers and classroom rewards. These jungle animal toys are ideal for themed birthday parties and celebrations. The jungle themed bat and ball games feature three different jungle designs on a coloured background. These will be sent randomly and subject to availability. Paddle ball game measures approximately 12cm. Recommended for children aged 3 years and over.
